lighting.shadow_character: Soft shadows, lifted by a reflector or fill light from the front-right

color.grading_style: Filmic look with lifted blacks and a subtle magenta/pink tint

composition.focus_point: Front part of the meat topping and wasabi
composition.composition_rule: Rule of Thirds and Leading Lines

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent rendering of different textures like glossy sauce, rough bowl, natural wood grain, and coarse fabric.

improvement_notes: For a more dramatic impact, add a small kicker light from the back-right. Enhance color richness by subtly applying complementary color contrast. Increase depth by layering elements in the foreground.
nano_banana_prompt: professional food photography of [YOUR_DISH], minimalist Japanese aesthetic, shot at a 45-degree eye-level angle, medium shot. Lighting is extremely soft and diffused, coming from the back-left, creating gentle, soft shadows to the front-right. A subtle fill light brightens the shadows. The overall mood is warm, clean, and inviting. Color palette is dominated by natural browns and warm whites with a fresh green accent, overall desaturated tones with a subtle warm pinkish tint. Shallow depth of field, focus sharp on the main subject, background softly blurred. The image has a gentle S-curve contrast with lifted blacks, creating a filmic look. --style raw --ar 4:5 --stylize 750 --quality 2 --v 6.0
